title: Isaac Newton
ground_truth_corrupted_sentence: In addition to his creation of calculus, Newton's work on mathematics was largely confined to applied problems.
guessed_corrupted_sentence: He originated prisms as beam expanders and multiple-prism arrays, which would later become integral to the development of tunable lasers.

parsed_response.corrupted_sentence: He originated prisms as beam expanders and multiple-prism arrays, which would later become integral to the development of tunable lasers.
parsed_response.explanation: Newton performed seminal prism experiments and developed a theory of color, but the concepts of prism beam expanders, multiple-prism arrays, and their role in tunable lasers are 20th‑century laser optics developments. Attributing the origin of these specific laser-related techniques to Newton is anachronistic and not supported by historical accounts or standard references on his work.
